ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please use the buttons below:
ast.target: If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please use the buttons below:

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, enter advances to the next row. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.
ast.target: Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, enter advances to the next row. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, tab/shift+tab navigate between cells. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.
ast.target: Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, tab/shift+tab navigate between cells. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, table cells will have spaces added to match the width of the longest cell in the column.
ast.target: If enabled, table cells will have spaces added to match the width of the longest cell in the column.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a button which opens the table controls toolbar will be added to the Obsidian sidebar. The toolbar can also be opened with a Hotkey. Changes only take effect on reload.
ast.target: If enabled, a button which opens the table controls toolbar will be added to the Obsidian sidebar. The toolbar can also be opened with a Hotkey. Changes only take effect on reload.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Advanced Tables: Unable to determine current editor.
ast.target: Advanced Tables: Unable to determine current editor.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Advanced Tables: Cursor must be in a table.
ast.target: Advanced Tables: Cursor must be in a table.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Advanced Tables: Next row also bound to enter. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.
ast.target: Advanced Tables: Next row also bound to enter. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Advanced Tables: Next cell also bound to tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.
ast.target: Advanced Tables: Next cell also bound to tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Advanced Tables: Previous cell also bound to shift+tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.
ast.target: Advanced Tables: Previous cell also bound to shift+tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.

ast.name: name
ast.source: Format all tables in this file
ast.target: Format all tables in this file
